title: No One Shall Die
description: A Mod that does not allow you to die
body:
This mod gives allows the player to not die if they are at the brink of death(1 heart )
and as the name the name implies it is the same ability from bungo stray dogs but you can not heal others

Details
the player can not take any damage if the player is at 1 full heart or below
the player can not die
this ability will not work if the player is holding a totem of undying


Hope you like this mod
Bye !!
